positive: A whimsical, stylized forest creature, half fox, half owl, perched on an antique branch against a deep midnight blue background. The creature has bright, luminous eyes and flowing, ethereal feathers mixed with sleek, russet-orange fur. Style: Minimalist vector illustration combined with sophisticated watercolor textures. The composition must feature a clear, strong silhouette of the central figure, with vibrant contrast achieved through glowing accents (glowing yellow/cyan highlights) and deep jewel-toned backgrounds. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the shape. Color Palette: Emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and luminous gold. Perfect for repeat apparel pattern or central motif print. High detail, flat design elements mixed with painterly depth.
